title: AI is proving a 100-year-old prediction true
description: Great minds go off on odd tangents. In 1930, John Maynard Keynes took time out from thinking about the Great Depression, which was throwing millions out of work, to write a charming essay about the “economic possibilities for our grandchildren.”...

description: We are living in an age where cutting-edge AI models are introduced on a near-daily basis.
